channel.title: 经济学论文雷达
channel.description: 经济学论文雷达：自动追踪重点经济学期刊和工作论文来源的最新论文。

item.title: The spatial allocation effects of central transfers: evidence from China
No man’s land? The effect of forced displacement on forest cover change in Colombia
Distance, prospects, and migration to towns and cities
Unpacking spatially explicit cropland non-agriculturalization in China based on satellite remote sensing data: A 30-year analysis of spatial patterns and conversion types
Land-use change and long-term socioeconomic outcomes: Studying over six decades of global data (1960–2023)
Disaster exposure and residential solar adoption: Urban evidence from Japan
Structural adjustment of industrial land use and economic resilience: Evidence from China's poverty-stricken counties
Socioeconomic and environmental challenges affecting sustainable land management in Africa: A systematic review towards integrated framework proposal
Mapping indigenous California: Agency and tribal perspectives on ancestral territorial representation
A stakeholder-integrated land-use model for nature conservation in metropolitan areas: The case of the Randstad, Netherlands
Spatio-temporal analysis of vegetation cover transitions and underlying governance approaches in Malawi, Southern Africa
Cognition behind land transactions: How diverse forest value orientations shape willingness, price expectations, and forestland transfer behavior in rural China
The speculation trap and the distress push: Divergent pathways of peri-urban agriculture in Tanzania
Beyond top-down policymaking: Policymaker–landowner interaction promotes reforestation in a strategy game
Land tenure security and agroecological transitions: Evidence from a discrete choice experiment in Angola
What motivates Irish farmers to participate in new afforestation schemes: Financial or environmental drivers?
Climate change drives agricultural land use competition in the Paranapanema River Basin, Southeastern Brazil
Econobiomes: A terrestrial-based country classification for international sustainability comparison
BGBI: A citywide-referenced and bidirectional land use mix index for planning and policy evaluation
Patrilocal residence and young women’s status: Evidence from Sri Lanka
Informal institutions and global trade: Real effects of the elusive
Unintended consequences of externally aided projects on fiscal transfers: a subnational study of India
Brazil’s pacifying police units revisited: A failed democratic policing project and lessons for institutional reforms
Is there a business case for banks to increase lending to women and women-led firms? Cross-country evidence on financial performance
Editorial Board
Corporate governance in microfinance institutions: A systematic review of theoretical perspectives, methodological approaches, and empirical evidence
The impact of the Tigray war on child education and labor in Ethiopia
The two sides of migration in Central America: aggregate and distributional impacts in Guatemala
Long panel studies of small-scale rural societies in the Global South: What is their value, why are they rare, and suggestions to make them happen
The impact of trade integration on the business cycles synchronization in West African Countries: Implications for the AfCFTA
The mobilization curse? How oil wealth affects the composition of resistance episodes
EU climate aid and trade interests: strategy or byproduct of closer ties?
Diamonds aren’t forever: manufactured substitutes, irreversible substitution, and the new resource curse
Estimating the value of land in Iran’s economy
Land sparing and sharing: Understanding the relationship between different construction land strategies and land functions in karst areas
Impact of gender equality on forest protection: Role of economic, social, political and energy factors
Exploring land cover change patterns in Hyrcanian forests through spatiotemporal trend analysis (2000–2022)
De-localization of global cities: How advanced producer services exacerbate regional spatial inequality?
Here comes the rain: Precipitation shocks and economic outcomes in Ecuador
The environmental smile curve: input-output evidence on the pollution haven hypothesis
Heat after the Harvest: Farmer Choices and Perceptions of Crop Residue Burning in Thailand
Large-scale land acquisitions in Ethiopia: Impacts on agricultural productivity and deforestation
Measuring housing market slack
